rent: noun. A payment made by a tenant at intervals in order to lease a property.
rente: noun. In France, interest payable by government on indebtedness; the bonds, shares, stocks, etc. that represent government indebtedness.
ret: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Retta.

their: determiner. Belonging to, from, of, or relating to, them (plural).
there: adverb. In or at a place or location (stated, implied or otherwise indicated) that is perceived to be away from, or at a relative distance
therein: adverb. in that; in that place; in him/her/it.
thin: adjective. Having little thickness or extent from one surface to its opposite.
thine: determiner. Second-person singular prevocalic possessive determiner (preconsonantal form: thy).
thinner: adjective. comparative form of thin: more thin
three: noun. NATO & ICAO radiotelephony clear code (spelling-alphabet name) for the digit 3.
tire: verb. To become sleepy or weary.
